# Schedule

::: {.callout-tip appearance="simple"}
See the schedule for the pre-conference events [here](pre-conference.qmd).
:::

```{r}
#| results: asis
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
source("../R/schedule.R")
render_detailed_program(
  program_csv = "../data/program.csv",
  sessions_csv = "../data/sessions.csv"
)
```
